1057.issue: [E1057] admin 6.17.14 listed as dependency but 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please update globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/io-package.json).

4043.issue: [E4043] Incorrect schema URL for jsonConfig files in .vscode/settings.json. Expected: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.admin/master/packages/jsonConfig/schemas/jsonConfig.json", found: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ioBroker/adapter-react-v5/main/schemas/jsonConfig.json"

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "tls" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:tls" instead.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#593] "[iobroker-bot] Update Dependabot Configuration – Add npm Cooldown"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/issues/593)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0036.issue: [E0036] @iobroker/testing 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.2 is required as minimum,  5.2.2 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 20 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '18' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json).
